topic: A clearance application that needed three follow-ups, two visits, and four WhatsApp messages — for one client
format: Open with a question that forces the reader to calculate their own answer: how many work permits are you tracking right now, and where exactly is that information?
post:
Last week I watched a clearance application eat up three follow-ups, two office visits, and four WhatsApp messages. One client. One application.

That's Tuesday in a Sanad office.

Across Oman's 924 licensed offices, this is just how it runs. Not because PRO officers are slacking — they're not. They're buried. The problem is that nothing shows you what's been submitted, what's still pending, or whose court the ball is in right now. That's living in three phones, two notebooks, and whatever you can remember from this morning.

Now stack 20 client companies on top of that. Forty work permits. Fifteen visa renewals. Eight MOL filings. It doesn't collapse because of workload. It collapses because you genuinely cannot see the whole picture at once.

SmartPro Hub fixes the visibility problem. Case tracking per client, expiry alerts before things go critical, tasks assigned to specific PRO officers, and a client portal so companies can check their own status instead of sending you yet another WhatsApp at 4pm.

Everything in one place. Nothing expiring quietly inside a chat thread that scrolled off the screen two weeks ago.

Book a free 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=sanad-pro-en
Or WhatsApp +96879665522
